vehicle.label: Long-Range Surveillance Wing
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing flying-wing UAV, 2m wingspan, 4+ hour endurance

parts.label: Center Body Pod
parts.spec: Flying-wing center pod, equipment bay door, wing-spar reinforcement, motor pylon at rear

parts.label: Wing Spar (2-piece)
parts.spec: 20mm CFRP main spar, 2-piece centerjoint, anti-rotation key, 800mm half-span each

parts.label: Wing Rib Set x 12
parts.spec: Wing rib NACA airfoil profile, lightening pockets, leading edge sock, trailing edge taper

parts.label: Elevon Servo Pocket x 2
parts.spec: Elevon servo pocket, MG90S or DS215MG, control horn linkage, removable access cover

parts.label: Motor + Pusher Prop Mount
parts.spec: Rear pusher 2814 BLDC mount, 10x7 folding prop clearance, thrust line +1deg down

parts.label: GPS + Pitot Boom
parts.spec: Nose boom 8mm, GPS at tip, pitot static port forward, BEC airflow shielded

parts.label: Camera Gimbal Bay
parts.spec: Forward downward camera gimbal bay 70mm deep, 2-axis micro gimbal, optical window

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide)
parts.spec: 4S 16000mAh Li-ion slide-in bay, CG adjust slot, top access hatch, balance lead window

parts.label: Integration Service Backbone
parts.spec: Wing/fuselage integration service backbone with assembly_datum pads, harness_raceway, service_hatch, connector_keying, anti-rotation wing datum, and visible load-path inspection marks

requirements: Flying-wing center pod, equipment bay door, wing-spar reinforcement, motor pylon at rear
Actuation: Motor pod / pusher prop mount dummy with bolt pattern and cooling path (non-operational)
Environmental context: Outdoor flight, -10 to +45C, dust/humidity
Design loads: wing bending 3g, servo 2-8Nm, catapult launch 15g

verify.value: All required fields are present and non-empty.
verify.rule: Ensure all schema fields are provided and populated.
Ensure the mass estimate is within the design envelope.

verify.value: All P0 internal_feature_targets appear as part_tree children and geometry_ops ids or targets.
verify.rule: Ensure P0 internal_feature_targets are mapped to geometry_ops.

verify.value: All interfaces have matching connection_type and required_feature in neighboring subsystems.
verify.rule: Ensure interfaces are reciprocal with neighboring subsystems.

verify.value: All critical joints have visible locking methods and preload evidence.
verify.rule: Ensure critical joints have visible locking methods and preload evidence.
Ensure boundary conditions are defined for downstream CFD/FEA.

risk.desc: Potential for blocked access to serviceable components due to complex geometry.
risk.mit: Design with clear access paths and callouts for serviceability.

risk.desc: Risk of weak interfaces due to thin wall sections in the cooling inlet.
risk.mit: Increase wall thickness or use inserts for additional strength.

risk.desc: Risk of tolerance mismatch between FDM and foam core material.
risk.mit: Conduct a tolerance stack-up analysis and adjust geometry as needed.

risk.desc: Risk of overclaiming the structural integrity of the motor pod attachment.
risk.mit: Perform a detailed FEA analysis to validate the design.

risk.desc: Risk of process limitations affecting the final assembly sequence.
risk.mit: Review the assembly sequence and adjust as necessary to accommodate manufacturing constraints.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Flying-wing center pod, equipment bay door, wing-spar reinforcement, motor pylon at rear

physics_paths.description: Transfers wing-bending and servo loads to the wing spar
Cooling air flow from inlet to motor pod cooling path
Heat dissipation from equipment bay to outer skin
Opening and closing motion of the equipment bay door
Electrical harness routing from equipment bay to motor pod

internal_feature_targets.description: Mounting point for the motor pod
Bolt pattern for attaching motor pod
Inlet for cooling air flow to motor pod
Pattern of fasteners for structural integrity

integration_opportunities.description: Integration of motor pod electrical harness

manufacturing_strategy.support: orientation: vertical, inspection: visual and tactile

verification_focus.description: Visual inspection of motor pod cooling path
Torque test of motor pod attachment bolts
Finite element analysis of wing spar reinforcement

verify.value: All interfaces named with exact neighboring subsystem labels and chosen connection_type + DOF + clearance_mm + required_feature.
verify.rule: Each interface must name exact neighboring subsystem labels and choose connection_type + DOF + clearance_mm + required_feature.

risk.desc: Potential misalignment during assembly due to complex interface designs.
risk.mit: Implement alignment jigs and detailed assembly instructions.

risk.desc: Risk of thermal stress due to uneven heat distribution.
risk.mit: Incorporate cooling channels and thermal management materials.

risk.desc: Risk of service access panel misalignment affecting maintenance.
risk.mit: Design with clear alignment marks and easy-to-use fasteners.

risk.desc: Risk of fastener failure due to incorrect torque application.
risk.mit: Provide torque wrenches and detailed torque specifications.

risk.desc: Risk of structural failure due to inadequate load path continuity.
risk.mit: Ensure all load paths are continuous and properly fitted.

Heat transfer from wing skin to spar, then to cooling channels and fuselage
Wing flexure and vibration transmitted from wing skin to spar and carry-through

integration_opportunities.description: Battery bay access for maintenance and replacement

manufacturing_strategy.datum: Primary locating faces and rail guides
manufacturing_strategy.tolerance: Tolerance stack-up for bolted interfaces: H7/h6

risk.desc: Potential thermal stress on winglets due to heat transfer from ribs
risk.mit: Implement thermal insulation between ribs and winglets

risk.desc: Risk of improper fastener preload leading to joint failure

risk.desc: Risk of insufficient access for maintenance and inspection
risk.mit: Increase service access panel size and ensure easy removal

risk.desc: GPS signal integrity may be compromised by electromagnetic interference from power lines.
risk.mit: Ensure power and signal lines are separated and shielded.

risk.desc: Airflow shield may not provide sufficient protection for the GPS antenna.
risk.mit: Increase the size of the airflow shield or add additional shielding.

risk.desc: Potential misalignment during assembly due to lack of clear alignment features.
risk.mit: Add alignment features or improve the clarity of assembly instructions.

risk.desc: Potential for incorrect mating of connectors due to lack of keying or labeling.
risk.mit: Implement keying or labeling on connectors to prevent mis-mating.

The subsystem must include slide rails for battery adjustment and service access for BMS and connectors.
Ensure harnesses are routed through visible raceways and maintain visibility of spar sockets and anti-rotation keys.

Service harness path from wing spar to service_hatch
Thermal dissipation path from avionics to ambient air
Wing rotation about anti-rotation wing datum
Electrical and data connection from avionics to harness

adjacent_interfaces.assembly_order_hint: align wing spar to fuselage structure, then fasten with M4 bolts
align wing spar to anti_rotation_wing_datum, then fasten with M4 bolts
align service hatch to service access window, then fasten with M3 screws
